# Task Discovery Policy

## Label Taxonomy

Every active issue should carry:

- one `type/*` label
- one `priority/*` label
- one `area/*` label

Use `needs-triage` only while the issue is waiting for ownership or prioritization.

## Backlog Health

- do not leave new issues unlabeled
- remove `needs-triage` within one working week
- close or re-scope stale issues rather than letting them decay silently

## PR Evidence

Every PR should include:

- a concise summary
- the commands or checks used as proof
- the main risk or rollback note
